name: rshA
function: Anti-sigma factor that regulates the stress response sigma factor SigH (PMID 22937074, PMID 18728196). Coordinates an [Fe-S] cluster (PMID 22937074). Acts as a stress sensor and redox switch, negatively regulating SigH activity (PMID 18728196).  Also described as a phosphatase involved in stress response regulation, continuously inactivated by PknB (PMID 31561525). Regulates expression of SigE, trxB1, and trxC (PMID 31561525).
drug_susc_impact: Mutations confer resistance to azole drugs like econazole (PMID 32974504). Puupehenone metabolites show activity against dormant MTB (PMID 31561525). Thioridazine inhibits NDH-2 and provides protection from reactive oxygen species (PMID 31561525).
infection_impact: Regulates SigH, impacting Mtb adaptation and virulence (PMID 22937074). Required for virulence in animal models, partially relieving SigH negative regulation (PMID 18728196). Plays a role in survival under extreme stress (PMID 31561525).
